items.title: AI company Eightfold sued for helping companies secretly score job seekers
items.description: Jan 21 (Reuters) - Eightfold AI, a venture capital-backed artificial intelligence hiring platform used by Microsoft, PayPal and many other Fortune 500 companies, is being sued in California for allegedly compiling ​reports used to screen job applicants without their knowledge. The lawsuit filed on Tuesday accusing Eightfold of ‌violating the Fair Credit Reporting Act shows how consumer advocates are seeking to apply existing law to AI systems capable of drawing inferences ‌about individuals bas

items.title: Is Salesforce (CRM) Looking Attractive Again After Recent Share Price Weakness?
items.description: If you are wondering whether Salesforce at around US$220 per share is starting to look interesting again, you are not alone. This article is designed to help you frame that question clearly. The stock has seen an 8.7% decline over the last 7 days, a 15.3% decline over the last 30 days, a 13.2% decline year to date, and a 32.2% decline over the last year. At the same time, the 3 year return sits at 43.8%, while the 5 year return is close to flat at a 1.6% decline. Recent headlines have kept...

items.title: Salesforce Earnings Preview: What to Expect
items.description: Salesforce is gearing up to release its fourth-quarter results soon, and analysts are expecting a single-digit decline in earnings.
